title: Sherwin-Williams (SHW) Upgraded to Strong Buy: Here's What You Should Know
text: Sherwin-Williams (SHW) has been upgraded to a Zacks Rank #1 (Strong Buy), reflecting growing optimism about the company's earnings prospects. This might drive the stock higher in the near term.

title: 2 Stocks Getting Positive Attention From Wall Street on Tuesday
text: Markets pushed slightly higher early Tuesday. Logitech shares moved higher despite falling sales as investors praised a boost to future guidance.

title: The Sherwin-Williams Company raises guidance following record 2Q sales
text: The Sherwin-Williams Company (SHW) has announced record second revenue and upped its full-year profit and sales guidance, sending its shares higher. Shares of the Cleveland-based paint company added 4.7% at US$280.67 late morning on Tuesday.

title: Compared to Estimates, Sherwin-Williams (SHW) Q2 Earnings: A Look at Key Metrics
text: Although the revenue and EPS for Sherwin-Williams (SHW) give a sense of how its business performed in the quarter ended June 2023, it might be worth considering how some key metrics compare with Wall Street estimates and the year-ago numbers.

title: Sherwin-Williams (SHW) Q2 Earnings and Revenues Top Estimates
text: Sherwin-Williams (SHW) came out with quarterly earnings of $3.29 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $2.71 per share. This compares to earnings of $2.41 per share a year ago.

title: Sherwin-Williams stock rises in premarket after it beats analyst forecasts as sales hit a record
text: Sherwin-Williams Co. SHW, -0.26% stock was rising by 5.2% in premarket action on Tuesday after the paint maker boosted its profit outlook as its second-quarter profit exceeded analyst estimates on higher prices and record revenue. The company booked selling price increases in all its segments, as well as higher sales volume in the paint stores group, while benefitting from “moderating raw material costs.

title: The Sherwin-Williams Company Reports 2023 Second Quarter Financial Results
text: CLEVELAND , July 25, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- The Sherwin-Williams Company (NYSE: SHW) announced its financial results for the second quarter ended June 30, 2023. All comparisons are to the second quarter of the prior year, unless otherwise noted.

title: What's in the Cards for Sherwin-Williams (SHW) in Q2 Earnings?
text: Sherwin-Williams' (SHW) Q2 performance is likely to have been supported by cost reductions and margin improvement initiatives amid headwinds from a challenging demand environment.

title: Time to Cash In: 3 (More) Stocks to Sell at 52-Week Highs
text: Warren Buffett famously said that investors should be “fearful when others are greedy and greedy when others are fearful.” So with many on the Street starting to get greedy, as demonstrated by the market's huge rallies in recent months, a case can be made that investors should start to become more fearful than they were previously.

title: The Sherwin-Williams Company Elects New Director
text: Thomas L. Williams, Executive Chairman of Parker-Hannifin Corporation, joins the Board CLEVELAND , July 19, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- The Sherwin-Williams Company (NYSE: SHW) announced that its Board of Directors elected Thomas L. Williams to the Board, effective yesterday.

title: Sherwin-Williams Declares Dividend of $0.605 per Common Share
text: CLEVELAND , July 19, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- The Board of Directors of The Sherwin-Williams Company (NYSE: SHW) today announced a regular quarterly dividend of $0.605 per common share payable on September 8, 2023, to shareholders of record on August 18, 2023. title: Sherwin-Williams (SHW) Stock Up 15% in 3 Months: Here's Why
text: Sherwin Williams (SHW) is benefiting from robust domestic demand and continues to undertake pricing actions to offset cost increases.

text: Sherwin Williams' (SHW) cost-cutting initiatives, working capital reductions, supply chain optimization and productivity enhancements are resulting in margin growth.

title: Why Sherwin-Williams Stock Gained 17% in June

title: Sherwin-Williams (SHW) Hits 52-Week High: What's Aiding It?
